title: astragalus biebersteinii
intro: Astragalus biebersteinii, also known as milkvetch or goat's-thorn, is a perennial plant species native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and antioxidant effects, which help to boost the immune system and protect against inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus biebersteinii include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the body's natural response to illness and injury. Astragalus biebersteinii is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be added to soups or other dishes for its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
